prestazioni: Engine swap to M104.982 (3.2L inline-6) with forged Mahle pistons (86.5mm bore, 9.2:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile for high-RPM power (280+ hp at 7,000 RPM). Paired with a custom 6-3-1 stainless steel header by Supersprint and a 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for aggressive scavenging.

Bosch Motronic ME2.1 ECU reflash via a standalone AEM Infinity 708T (W202 plug-and-play harness) with custom fuel maps for 98 RON fuel, paired with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors, and a custom 3" velocity stack intake with a K&N E-1960 filter for optimized airflow.

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (W124-specific valving) with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (40mm drop), polygraphite bushings by Powerflex (part #PF80-4101 for front control arms), and a custom 25mm rear sway bar by H&R (W124 coupe-specific) to eliminate body roll. Braking upgraded to 330mm front rotors with ATE PowerDisc slotted rotors and Brembo 08.9754.10 calipers, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (W124 coupe-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon, paired with OEM+ Euro-spec W124 headlights (Hella DE projector lenses) and smoked LED taillights by LUX Automotive.

BBS RS-GT II 17x9" (ET15) and 17x10" (ET20) wheels with custom offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear). Fender flares rolled and pulled for clearance, with custom aluminum fender braces by K-Mac.

Full respray in Mercedes-Benz Classic Signal Red (DB 568) with a 3-stage PPG paint process, including a custom matte black roof and mirror caps. Interior stripped and retrimmed in Nappa leather by Recaro (CS Sportster seats) with Alcantara headliner and custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede).
